current_life_events: I just had a disagreement with a close friend over plans for the weekend; they said they couldn't make it, and I felt ignored. Since then I've been trying to organize a group outing but no one has responded. Work is also piling up with a new marketing campaign, so I’m juggling deadlines and the social void at the same time.
mental_state: I’m feeling frustrated and a bit lonely, but I also want to fix the friendship and get back on track with my work.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The recent fallout with a friend and the lack of responses to my plans have made me feel isolated, while the added work pressure is amplifying my stress and pushing me to seek help today.
